_comment: Sample Ferrisletter data file. Use this as a template for your own newsletter.

topics.label: Rust
topics.description: News and releases from the Rust ecosystem

topics.label: AI & LLMs
topics.description: Large language models, agents, and AI tooling

topics.label: Open Source
topics.description: Notable open-source releases and community news

items.headline: Your headline goes here
items.summary: A one or two sentence summary of the item — shown in the compact view.
items.body: The full article text goes here. This is shown when a user asks to expand the item. It can be as long as you need — a few paragraphs is ideal for conversational use.

items.headline: Another example item
items.summary: Short summary for the AI topic. Tags help with search.
items.body: Full text of this item. Users can search for it by keyword, filter by tag, or ask for a recap since a given date.
